subject: perf(render): fix timer leak, memoize filter, stable keys, extract function
body:
- Add cleanup for copy-state setTimeout in DebugBanner (prevents setState
  on unmounted component during rapid copies or early unmount)
- Memoize errorCount filter with useMemo (avoids filtering up to 200
  entries on every DebugBanner render)
- Replace index-based keys with content-based keys in About and
  TimelineItem (stable reconciliation if data changes)
- Extract statusIcon as a module-level function (avoids recreating
  function reference on every render)

Tags: performance, react, memoization, timer-cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: performance
Semver: patch
